results.term: Not the best.  I have been quarantined for 5 weeks...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Not the best.  I have been quarantined for 5 weeks with COVID-19 (tested positive), so I am getting cabin fever.

results.term: I am starting to get an aversion to holidays.  Whe...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content:
I am starting to get an aversion to holidays.  When I was in college, my father was dying, and Thanksgiving was the last meal he ate at the family table...
Christmas was the last time he ate solid food,
and he died on the day after Epiphany

results.term: So I have come to associate Thanksgiving through J...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: So I have come to associate Thanksgiving through January as a time of loss.

results.term: This month has driven it home more, because I have...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: This month has driven it home more, because I have had six people die this month.  It's starting to bring on flashbacks.

results.term: No, my family all moved from the area.  The neares...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No, my family all moved from the area.  The nearest is now half a country away and hasn't spoken to me in over ten years.

results.term: It's been... interesting.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It's been... interesting.

results.term: Ahhh... I hate to be that guy, but I really don't ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Ahhh... I hate to be that guy, but I really don't have that many friends.  I have a couple people at my church who have checked in, but I wouldn't go so far as to call them friends (we don't hang out, I don't get invited over...)

results.term: I was in college.  He died slowly and painfully.  ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I was in college.  He died slowly and painfully.  It was really unpleasant.

results.term: And he was a brilliant man.  I could only wish to ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And he was a brilliant man.  I could only wish to be half of what he was.

results.term: I don't even have contact information for them any...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I don't even have contact information for them anymore.  The last known phone numbers have been disconnected and the last time I sent mail, it was returned for wrong address, no forwarding information known.

results.term: I think they forgot about me.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think they forgot about me.

results.term: The only one I still have contact with is my mothe...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The only one I still have contact with is my mother.

results.term: I avoid comparing myself to others.  I usually com...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I avoid comparing myself to others.  I usually come out on the bad side of it.

results.term: I talk to her regularly.  She is okay, but I fear ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I talk to her regularly.  She is okay, but I fear she is reaching the age where I know I won't have her much longer.

results.term: I'm just thankful I have had her this long

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm just thankful I have had her this long

results.term: That I do.  While I will never have the skills my ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: That I do.  While I will never have the skills my father had technically, I am thankful that I did get his ability to be analytical and his compassion for others.

results.term: Absolutely.  I still remember him teaching me thin...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Absolutely.  I still remember him teaching me things that I use to this day.  I still smile when I think of one time when he first became ill and couldn't get out of bed...

results.term: there was a project he wanted to do and it bothere...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: there was a project he wanted to do and it bothered him that it had not gotten done.  Well, I was able to do it, because he had taught me enough to know what to do.

results.term: The look of pride in his face was priceless.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The look of pride in his face was priceless.

results.term: The one thing I carry on because of him is my love...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The one thing I carry on because of him is my love for my church.  He was on the church vestry (governing board).  I am on my church worship team.

results.term: I actually made church history, because I sing wit...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I actually made church history, because I sing with the praise team (some churches call that a choir), but I sing many of the songs in American Sign Language.

results.term: I am the first signing member of the church.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am the first signing member of the church.

results.term: 2021 will be the 50 year anniversary of our congre...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: 2021 will be the 50 year anniversary of our congregation.

results.term: I joined just over ten years ago.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I joined just over ten years ago.

results.term: My church is my anchor.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My church is my anchor.

results.term: My pastor is wonderful.  He is like the little bro...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My pastor is wonderful.  He is like the little brother I didn't have but always wanted.

results.term: My favorite story about signing in the church is h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My favorite story about signing in the church is how it began...  I had asked to do it and had been shot down cold six times.  Well, I laugh now, but at the time I was angry.

results.term: If you mean me, I'm male.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: If you mean me, I'm male.

results.term: But the last time I was told I could not sign for ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: But the last time I was told I could not sign for the church, I told the elder who said no that God was going to give him a sign.

results.term: Well, God delivered on the promise quickly.  That ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, God delivered on the promise quickly.  That same who  morning we had a family visit who were on a road trip.  They just were passing through but wanted to go to church while travelling.

results.term: They had a little girl about 6 or 7 years old who ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: They had a little girl about 6 or 7 years old who was Deaf.  She saw me sitting in the back of the sanctuary signing the lyrics to the songs, and praying in Sign.  Her face lit up and she started signing too.

results.term: At the end of the service, she found me and gave m...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: At the end of the service, she found me and gave me a big hug around my legs and then looked up and said "I always wanted to go to a church where someone knew MY language!"

results.term: From that point on, there was no problem with me s...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: From that point on, there was no problem with me signing in church.

results.term: I think He placed her there for me, also.  It was ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think He placed her there for me, also.  It was a mutual deal.

results.term: There is no one in my congregation at the moment w...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: There is no one in my congregation at the moment who signs, but I keep hoping for the future.

results.term: No.  That mission has been placed on my heart.

turn_info.content: No.  That mission has been placed on my heart.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I was confirmed in a different denomination as a child, but I learned nothing.  One day I realized that I have no knowledge of the faith, and that did not sit well with me.

results.term: So I am changing that and not just paying lip serv...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: So I am changing that and not just paying lip service to Jesus, but actively seeking Him.

results.term: Absolutely.

turn_info.content: Absolutely.

results.term: I was not always.  I drifted a few years back.  My...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I was not always.  I drifted a few years back.  My church family gave me a gift and sent me to a religious retreat at a resort owned by my church denomination.  It was there and in that moment that I came back to God.

results.term: I try to go each year, as it's an annual retreat. ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I try to go each year, as it's an annual retreat.  I missed this year because of COVID, but hoping for next year.  I was going to take a friend from out of state.  He couldn't attend due to the pandemic.  But if all goes well, next year will be different.

results.term: It was about 15 years for me, as well.

turn_info.content: It was about 15 years for me, as well.

results.term: I was never far away, just not close enough, if yo...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I was never far away, just not close enough, if you know what I mean.

results.term: I left my childhood church because it turned into ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I left my childhood church because it turned into a false church, and it no longer teaches God's word.

results.term: I still pray for them daily that they can realize ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I still pray for them daily that they can realize what they are doing, repent and turn it around.

results.term: It took years to find a church that God wanted me ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It took years to find a church that God wanted me to be with, but I have found my church family, and I love them.  I am closer to my church family than I am to blood relatives.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Due to technical issues, I can't sign for my church, but I do have the pleasure of streaming the service each week, so I can still see my pastor, hear his message, and worship.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Because of the way the feed is set up, I can not participate unless I am at the church building, and I need to wait until I am clear of the COVID infection first.

results.term: I watch the service live each week.  Actually, I h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I watch the service live each week.  Actually, I have told the pastor I have gotten spoiled and like the online streaming because I can watch the service again, later.

results.term: There are days when I am closed up in my room want...
